issuer-empty-state.jpg.tool: nano-banana (Gemini 3.1 flash image preview via OpenRouter)
issuer-empty-state.jpg.prompt_summary: Minimalist abstract line-art empty institutional financial dashboard. Geometric clipboard / data grid / workspace shapes, no data populated. Thin clean strokes. Monochrome composition: single cyan accent (hsl(190, 90%, 55%)) on near-black background (hsl(220, 16%, 8%)). Centered ~35% of frame, generous negative space. No text, no logos, no photorealism, no gradients, no glow, no sci-fi or Web3 themes.
issuer-empty-state.jpg.license: Generated; treat as project-owned per nano-banana / OpenRouter terms
issuer-empty-state.jpg.notes: JPEG instead of PNG (Gemini's choice for this content). Replace if PRD §14 Q4 picks a tenant whose brand mandates different imagery. Keep monochrome line-art language consistent across any future hero assets — see CLAUDE.md 'Aesthetic Direction'.

distributor-empty-state.jpg.tool: nano-banana (Gemini 3.1 flash image preview via OpenRouter)
distributor-empty-state.jpg.prompt_summary: Minimalist institutional dashboard line art on near-black canvas (hsl(220, 16%, 8%)). Hub-and-spokes distribution diagram in soft white strokes (1.5px), centered. Eight outer nodes connected to one central hub. One outer node accented in cyan (hsl(190, 90%, 55%)). No text, no gradients, no glow, no people, no logos, no photorealism. Subtle data-grid backdrop. Editorial, restrained, 4:3 aspect, 1200x896.
distributor-empty-state.jpg.license: Generated; treat as project-owned per nano-banana / OpenRouter terms
distributor-empty-state.jpg.notes: Hub-and-spokes evokes distributor-investor allocation network. Consistent visual language with issuer-empty-state.jpg.

ops-console-empty-state.jpg.tool: nano-banana (Gemini 3.1 flash image preview via OpenRouter)
ops-console-empty-state.jpg.prompt_summary: Minimalist institutional ops dashboard line art on near-black canvas (hsl(220, 16%, 8%)). Five system-status gauge dials arranged in a horizontal row, soft white strokes (1.5px), simple half-circle dials with single needle pointer per dial. Dial three (the center one) accented in cyan (hsl(190, 90%, 55%)). No text, no gradients, no glow, no photorealism, no logos. Subtle data-grid backdrop. Editorial, restrained, 4:3 aspect, 1200x896.
ops-console-empty-state.jpg.license: Generated; treat as project-owned per nano-banana / OpenRouter terms
ops-console-empty-state.jpg.notes: Five gauges evoke SLA / health / workflow status meters. Consistent visual language with issuer-empty-state.jpg.

admin-empty-state.jpg.tool: nano-banana (Gemini 3.1 flash image preview via OpenRouter)
admin-empty-state.jpg.prompt_summary: Minimalist institutional governance line art on near-black canvas (hsl(220, 16%, 8%)). A single key icon centered in the top half of the frame, soft white strokes (1.5px). Below it, a hierarchical permission tree extending downward — three branches splitting from the key, each branch with two leaf nodes (six leaves total). Key body accented in cyan (hsl(190, 90%, 55%)). No text, no gradients, no glow, no photorealism, no logos. Subtle data-grid backdrop. Editorial, restrained, 4:3 aspect, 1200x896.
admin-empty-state.jpg.license: Generated; treat as project-owned per nano-banana / OpenRouter terms
admin-empty-state.jpg.notes: Key + permission tree evokes platform admin role/identity governance. Consistent visual language with issuer-empty-state.jpg.
